Prompt and reports classify as split-specific noise with negative three-uniform-panel mean and only 1/3 positive splits.

closed_or_avoided_axes.evidence: Prior reports and prompt classify as weak or redundant; no bounded validation-only script surface appears likely to produce 3/3 positive support beyond current public best.

closed_or_avoided_axes.evidence: Code-surface search found materialize/submission paths, including aggressive_quota_runner and materializers; none were run because the hard contract forbids Kaggle submit and full-test/uploadable candidate CSV creation.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Only a genuinely independent validation-label-free base-model family, evaluated directly on multiple uniform splits against the current rankblend/live-best anchor, could reopen the search.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: No such local implementation surface was present and starting one from scratch would be unbounded/underpowered for this tick.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: UserKNN finite-value hygiene and smoke-only diagnostics.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: This is cleanup for a stalled closed family, not a fresh axis; broad relaunch is explicitly disallowed.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: A non-boundary disagreement diagnostic that does not reuse quarantined capacity/frontier/rankblend/jackknife families.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: Available local disagreement surfaces collapsed into already weak, public-negative, or quarantined families.

verdict_reason: After direct rg/ast-grep/code-surface inspection plus artifact review, no fresh bounded validation-only probe remained that avoided closed/quarantined families and had a credible path to strict gate support. The freshest independent OTTO confirmation failed mean/min/3-of-3/p gates and then failed public transfer; adjacent relaunch would repeat a closed family. Therefore no probe was launched and no candidate/submission artifact was created.
